tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb

recommended.song_name: The Man Who Cant Be Moved

content:
Tune half step down, no capo (this is the studio version not the acoustic version. This is meant to be played
along with on the album stop all the world now.)


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Csus2[/ch]         [ch]Gadd4/B[/ch] ([ch]Gsus4[/ch] also works)
The dawn is breaking[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]FM7[/ch]
  A light shining through[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
You're barely waking[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]FM7[/ch]
And I'm tangled up in you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch] - [ch]Am[/ch] - [ch]FM7[/ch]
Yeah[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I'm open, you're closed[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]FM7[/ch]
Where I follow, you'll go[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
I worry I won't see your face[/tab]
[tab][ch]FM7[/ch]
Light up again[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Even the best fall down sometimes[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]FM7[/ch]
Even the wrong words seem to rhyme[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Out of the doubt that fills my mind[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]      
I somehow find[/tab]
[tab][ch]FM7[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
You and I collide[/tab]

[ch]C[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch] - [ch]Am[/ch] - [ch]FM7[/ch]


[Verse 3]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I'm quiet you know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]FM7[/ch]
You make a first impression[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]FM7[/ch]
I've found I'm scared to know I'm always on your mind[/tab]


[Chorus 2]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Even the best fall down sometimes[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]FM7[/ch]
Even the stars refuse to shine[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Out of the back you fall in time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
I somehow find[/tab]
[tab][ch]FM7[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
You and I collide[/tab]


[Bridge] x3

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Don't stop here[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
I lost my place[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
Im close behind[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Even the best fall down sometimes[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]FM7[/ch]
Even the wrong words seem to rhyme[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
Out of the doubt that fills your mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] 
You finally find[/tab]
[tab][ch]FM7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
You and I collide[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch] 
You finally find[/tab]
[tab][ch]FM7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
You and I collide[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] 
You finally find[/tab]
[tab][ch]FM7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
You and I collide [/tab]
